channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Four nabbed over alleged kidnapping in Anambra
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Anambra State Police Command arrests four suspected kidnappers involved in separate incidents, recovering weapons and foiling a kidnap plot. Read more on A
Read More: https://punchng.com/four-nabbed-over-alleged-kidnapping-in-anambra/

item.title: Cyberfraud: Lagos urges residents to protect digital identity
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lagos State Security Trust Fund urges residents to protect their digital identity against rising cyber fraud. Learn how to safeguard your personal informat
Read More: https://punchng.com/cyberfraud-lagos-urges-residents-to-protect-digital-identity/

item.title: Two abducted Ogun residents freed after ransom payment
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Two Ogun residents abducted in Kobape have been freed after their families paid a ransom. Learn more about the incident and police efforts.
Read More: https://punchng.com/two-abducted-ogun-residents-freed-after-ransom-payment/

item.title: LASEMA blames meter power surge for Lagos building fire
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A power surge from a prepaid meter caused a Lagos building fire in Ketu-Ikosi, LASEMA reports. Two firefighters collapsed during the rescue operation.
Read More: https://punchng.com/lasema-blames-meter-power-surge-for-lagos-building-fire/

item.title: Dollar sale row: Marketers halt Dangote fuel loading, FG steps in
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Petroleum marketers have suspended fuel loading at Dangote Refinery due to its dollar-denominated sales, sparking fears of scarcity. The FG is urged to int
Read More: https://punchng.com/dollar-sale-row-marketers-halt-dangote-fuel-loading-fg-steps-in/

item.title: Messi denied dream farewell as abject Argentina lose World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lionel Messi’s dream of another World Cup title ended in tears as Argentina lost the final to Spain. Read about Messi’s final World Cup match.
Read More: https://punchng.com/messi-denied-dream-farewell-as-abject-argentina-lose-world-cup-final/

item.title: Spain’s World Cup victory a perfect birthday gift, says Peter Obi
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Peter Obi, NDC presidential candidate, hails Spain’s 2026 World Cup victory as a ‘perfect birthday gift,’ emphasizing youth, competence, and excellence.
Read More: https://punchng.com/spains-world-cup-victory-a-perfect-birthday-gift-says-peter-obi/

item.title: FULL LIST: Mbappé leads Messi, others in 2026 World Cup top scorers chart
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
See the full list of 2026 World Cup top scorers! Kylian Mbappé leads with 10 goals, ahead of Lionel Messi, Jude Bellingham, and Erling Haaland.
Read More: https://punchng.com/full-list-mbappe-leads-messi-others-in-2026-world-cup-top-scorers-chart/

item.title: World Cup: Rodri wins golden ball, cements status among football greats
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Rodri wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup Golden Ball, cementing his status among football’s all-time greats. Discover his incredible career achievements.
Read More: https://punchng.com/world-cup-rodri-wins-golden-ball-cements-status-among-football-greats/

item.title: Lamine Yamal becomes first under-20 player to win Euro, World Cup
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lamine Yamal makes history as the first under-20 player to win both the UEFA European Championship and the FIFA World Cup. Discover his meteoric rise.
Read More: https://punchng.com/lamine-yamal-becomes-first-under-20-player-to-win-euro-world-cup/

item.title: Osimhen’s Temper Rules Him Out As Galatasaray Captain, Says Turkish Pundit
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Turkish sports commentator Bülent Timurlenk has declared that Victor Osimhen’s fiery temperament and poor anger management disqualify him from becoming Galatasaray’s next captain, even as he acknowledged the Nigerian striker’s exceptional performances merit the honor. The Super Eag

item.title: FIFA To Review Hydration Breaks After World Cup Final – Wenger
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: FIFA’s global football development chief, Arsène Wenger,says the long-term future of hydration breaks remains uncertain as football’s governing body prepares a thorough review following Sunday’s final. The three-minute stoppages, mandated for all games at this year’s tourname

item.title: The threat never sleeps: Protecting trust in Africa’s digital economy
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Nkiruka Aimienoho A subtle anomaly. An unpopular call to isolate critical systems. Resistance from every direction. That decision, made years ago with a key stakeholder during a live cybersecurity incident I was managing as a consultant, looked excessive at the time. It turned out to be the diff

item.title: World Cup final player ratings: Messi peters out as super-subs inspire Spain
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in one of the most one-sided World Cup finals in history. From Ferran Torres' heroics to Lionel Messi's last dance, here are the player ratings as Luis de la Fuente's side claimed their second star...

item.title: Aston Villa Eyes Double Swoop For Jackson, Garnacho
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Aston Villa have opened talks with Chelsea over a potential double swoop for Nicolas Jackson and Alejandro Garnacho, as they prepare to lose Morgan Rogers to Stamford Bridge in a British-record transfer, per TEAMtalk. The discussions, held alongside Rogers’ impending move, signal Villa’s aggressive

item.title: Neymar Acquires £17M Superyacht After World Cup Heartbreak
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Neymar Jr. has purchased a £17 million superyacht, completing the deal after Brazil’s shocking round-of-16 exit from the 2026 World Cup at the hands of Norway. The Santos forward’s new vessel, christened “Enejota” — a phonetic play on the Portuguese pronunciation of his initi

item.title: Victor Eburajolo: Mega employer who fought Nigeria’s deliberate de-industrialization, by Owei Lakemfa
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Forty years ago, on July 24, 1986, Victor Ogebyiwa Eburajolo was forty. He was a sought-after expert in the Nigerian industrial complex. A lawyer, business strategist, planning tactician, industrial and labour relations expert. He was then the Executive Secretary of Nigeria Textile Employers. The te

item.title: Jennifer Hudson, Post Malone, Robbie Williams to Headline FIFA World Cup 2026 Closing Ceremony
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concluded in grand style on Sunday as a host of global music and entertainment stars headlined a colourful closing ceremony at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey, ahead of the tournament’s final. Academy Award, Emmy, Grammy and Tony winner Jennifer Hudson of

item.title: FIFA’s First-Ever Official World Cup Halftime Showcase
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: History was made at the FIFA World Cup final in New Jersey as football’s biggest spectacle featured its first-ever official halftime show, bringing together an eclectic mix of global music stars and beloved pop culture icons. The groundbreaking performance featured Colombian superstar Shakira,

item.title: US Vice President JD Vance and his wife announce birth of fourth child
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: JD and Usha Vance welcome a baby boy, the first child born to a sitting vice president in more than 150 years.

item.title: Transcorp Power declares N1.50 interim dividend despite H1 profit decline
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Transcorp Power Plc has declared an interim dividend of N1.50 per ordinary share for the half-year ended June 30, 2026, even as revenue and profit before tax declined amid operational disruptions caused by recurring transmission infrastructure vandalism. The post Transcorp Power declares N1.50 inter

item.title: How NUPRC is rebuilding confidence in Nigeria’s oil sector
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: That shift did not happen by accident. It happened in a context that Mrs. Oritsemeyiwa Eyesan, six months into her tenure as Chief Commissioner/Executive of the Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission (NUPRC), is deliberately constructing. The post How NUPRC is rebuilding confidence in Nig

item.title: Changing NFF Leadership Won’t Save Nigerian Football, Says Gara Gombe
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Former Chairman of the Gombe State Football Association and veteran sports administrator, Ahmed Shuaibu Gara Gombe, has cautioned against attempts to unseat Nigeria Football Federation (NFF) President Ibrahim Gusau at the forthcoming federation elections, insisting that another leadership change wil

item.title: Rodri wins Golden Ball as Spain dominate World Cup awards
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The award adds to an already glittering career for the 30-year-old, who has won the Ballon d'Or, the UEFA Champions League, four Premier League titles, the European Championship and now the FIFA World Cup, further cementing his place among the finest midfielders of his generation.

item.title: Gold Falls as US-Iran Hostilities Keep Rate Hike Bets on Table
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Gold declined after the US and Iran ramped up attacks over the weekend, stoking bets the Federal Reserve may need to raise interest rates to contain inflation.

item.title: Senate’s belated rise against “repentant” terrorists
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Senate has finally given voice to a national outrage that has simmered for too long: Nigeria’s policy of rehabilitating and reintegrating so-called repentant Boko Haram fighters without doing them justice. It has outlived whatever limited utility its creators may once have claimed. A programme t

item.title: We Have Grown Together – Spain World Cup Winning Coach, de la Fuente
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: An emotional Spain coach Luis de la Fuente spoke of his pride in his players after they won the second World Cup in the country’s history. “I feel especially proud of this generation of footballers who have grown with this idea… giving us an example of a group, of a family,”

item.title: Oil prices surge, stock futures flat as fighting between U.S. and Iran intensifies
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Oil prices rose while U.S stock-index futures were little changed on Sunday, amid an escalation of fighting in the Middle East and as investors await key tech earnings this week.

item.title: Forest security, mineral resources and food security
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: When a nation loses control of its forests, mineral-rich communities, and agricultural zones, it risks allowing insecurity, illegal exploitation, and economic instability to weaken the foundation of the state. The post Forest security, mineral resources and food security appeared first on Vanguard N

item.title: Spain win World Cup by beating Argentina 1-0
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: La Roja have been crowned World Champions for the second time after a tense battle with Argentina in New Jersey.

item.title: Spain Deserved To World Cup, Says Argentina’s Coach Scaloni
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni admitted Spain were the better team following his team’s 1-0 extra-time defeat in the 2026 World Cup final on Sunday. Substitute Ferran Torres scored in the second period of extra-time as Spain finally broke down 10-man Argentina to win 1-0 at the MetLife Stadium

item.title: Fast-moving wildfire in southern France forces evacuations, burns homes in Var
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: A fast-moving wildfire in southern France forced dozens of residents to evacuate on Sunday as more than 600 firefighters and water-bombing aircraft battled the blaze. Fanned by strong winds and dry vegetation, the fire near Draguignan burned 10 homes, damaged nine others and slightly injured one fir

item.title: Andrew, Tristan Tate Arrested In US On New Charges Of Rape, Trafficking
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate have been arrested in the United States after British authorities issued 38 new charges against the brothers, including rape, actual bodily harm and human trafficking. Britain is seeking to extradite the brothers to face prosecution for both the new c

item.title: Mbappe Wins World Cup Golden Boot
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Kylian Mbappe won the 2026 World Cup Golden Boot on Sunday after Lionel Messi failed to add to his tally in the final in New Jersey. The France captain scored 10 goals to top the charts ahead of Argentina great Messi, who finished with eight. England midfielder Jude Bellingham and Norway striker Erl

item.title: Dominant Spain beat Argentina to win World Cup after extra time

item.description: Ferran Torres scores the only goal of the game as Spain dominate Argentina 1-0, to win their second FIFA World Cup at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

item.description: Spain won their second World Cup title after Ferran Torres' 106th-minute smashed finish earned a 1-0 win against defending champions Argentina in the 2026 final.

item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Coronation Infrastructure Fund (CIF) has proposed an interim income distribution of N8.985 per unit for the half-year ended June 30, 2026, translating to approximately N789.78 million payable to its 87.9 million outstanding units. item.title: 2026 World Cup: Spain beat Argentina in final to win trophy
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Spain have won the 2026 World Cup, following a 1-0 win over defending champions Argentina on Sunday. This is La Roja’s second world title ever, after they won it first in 2010. Luis de la Fuente’s men were in complete control of the game from start to finish, as Argentina struggled

item.title: Spain defeat Argentina to win 2026 World Cup
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Spain have won the 2026 FIFA World Cup following a 1-0 win over 10-man Argentina at the New York/New Jersey stadium in USA. Ferran Torres scored the winning goal in the second half of extra-time to break Argentina hearts, obliterating their dream of becoming the first country to successfully defend

item.title: Spain Beat Argentina in Extra Time to Win 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Spain were crowned champions of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after substitute Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal in extra time to secure a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Argentina in

item.title: Abia govt speaks on viral video of flooded building
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The Abia State Government has responded to a viral video of flooding along the Owerinta Road reconstruction corridor, attributing the incident to heavy rainfall, difficult terrain, and ongoing construction, while promising engineering adjustments to address residents' concerns. The post Abia govt sp

item.title: We want Texans to know their rights
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://www.eff.org/deeplinks/2026/07/we-want-texans-know-their-rights-qa-mayday-health-impact-surveillance-abortion Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48972062 Points: 67 # Comments: 10

item.title: Ferran Torres gives Spain extra-time lead against Argentina
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Ferran Torres breaks the deadlock, scoring in extra time for Spain in the World Cup final against Argentina at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

item.title: Torres Fires Spain To World Cup Title, Spoils Messi Fairytale
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Lionel Messi's Argentina battled their way through the knockout rounds, coming back from the dead against Egypt and recovering from a goal down to beat England in the semi-finals. The post Torres Fires Spain To World Cup Title, Spoils Messi Fairytale appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Spain crowned champions after extra-time thriller against Argentina
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: Spain crowned World champions after edging Argentina in dramatic final
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Ferran Torres emerged as Spain's hero, scoring the decisive goal in the 106th minute after connecting with a fine move involving Nico Williams to finally break Argentina's stubborn resistance.

item.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Brent crude jumped after the US and Iran escalated hostilities over the weekend, including the targeting of vessels attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz and an attack on a key oil facility in Kuwait.

item.title: Burna Boy, Madonna show sparks FIFA controversy at World Cup final
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: FIFA failed to keep its promise to Spain and Argentina over the length of the half-time show during the 2026 FIFA World Cup final.

item.title: Tinubu Calls for Unity Against Afro-Phobic Attacks
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has called on African leaders to present a united front against the renewed wave of Afro-phobic attacks in South Africa. Speaking through Vice President Kashim Shettima at the 69th ECOWAS Summit in Freetown, Sierra Leone, the President also urged stronger regional cooperation o
